definition: Distribution of traded volume at each price level over a period. Reveals where institutional orders concentrated (high volume) vs. where price moved freely (low volume).
depends_on: dealing_range (volume profile applied within dealing range context)
liquidity (volume profile reveals WHERE liquidity actually exists vs. theoretical)
feeds_into: draw_on_liquidity (low volume nodes are magnets — price accelerates through them)
related_to: liquidity_void (low volume areas in profile ARE liquidity voids)
order_blocks (high volume at OB zones CONFIRMS institutional activity)
fair_value_gaps (FVGs at low volume zones have highest fill probability)
bridge_integration: Wired into the live signal path on 2026-04-26. (1) Detector imported: bridge/ict_pipeline.py:70 now imports build_volume_profile from analysis.volume_profile. Step 8e7 (ict_pipeline.py around the cbdr_data block) calls build_volume_profile(df_primary.iloc[-96:], buckets=30) on the last ~24h of M15 bars and stores the result on SymbolAnalysis as vp_poc, vp_vah, vp_val, vp_hvn_zones (list of (low, high) ranges), vp_lvn_zones (same shape). HVN/LVN bucket midpoints are converted to range tuples using bucket_width = (price_max - price_min) / 30, half_width on each side, so downstream overlap checks use plain range arithmetic. (2) OB+HVN synergy now real: synergy_scorer._ob_at_high_volume (synergy_scorer.py around line 264-290) was rewritten to iterate ob_zones x vp_hvn_zones with standard interval-overlap (bottom_a <= top_b AND top_a >= bottom_b). The legacy FVG_stack/HiddenOB proxy is gone. The 'OB at high-volume zone (institutional footprint confirmed)' synergy at synergy_scorer.py:449-454 still awards +3 with tag 'OB+HVN' but the underlying check is now real volume data. ob_score >= 10 gate preserved. Active OBs are exposed on SymbolAnalysis.ob_zones via get_active_obs immediately after order-block detection in ict_pipeline.py step 4. (3) Prompt line: claude_decision.py around line 882 builds a vp_line ('VolumeProfile: POC=X VA=[L-H] HVNs=N LVNs=M') interpolated next to the Fib Extension TPs line in the active-conditions block at the bottom of the prompt skeleton (the same line that carries fib_line/adv_line/judas_line/asian_line). (4) Concept_injector trigger: liquidity_void card is now auto-loaded by concept_injector._select_relevant_concepts when SymbolAnalysis.liquidity_voids is non-empty (LVN zones above/below current price). The volume_profile card itself is NOT yet triggered explicitly — current strategy is to surface POC/VAH/VAL via the prompt line; if Claude needs methodological context, the dependency walker can pull this card in transitively. Future: add explicit trigger when current_price is within tolerance of POC/VAH/VAL. (5) Cross-validation rules: 'OB at HVN' rule from cross_correlations.json is now real (drives the +3 OB+HVN synergy). The other LVN/HVN rules (FVG-at-LVN priority, OB-at-LVN suspicion, void-as-TP) remain documentation-only — they would need additional code paths in claude_decision or a new pre-gate. (6) Limitations still present: build_volume_profile recomputes every cycle (no caching — measured fast enough on 96 bars x 30 buckets that this is fine, but worth profiling if symbol count grows); volume-profile is NOT computed on H1/H4 (M15-only); value-area is fixed at 70% (volume_profile.py default — not exposed as config). Treat any claim Claude makes about POC/HVN/LVN coordinates as REAL signal now, not aspirational.

key_levels.POC: Point of Control — the single price level with highest traded volume. Acts as strongest magnet. Price tends to return to POC.
key_levels.VAH: Value Area High — upper boundary of the 70% volume zone. Acts as resistance.
key_levels.VAL: Value Area Low — lower boundary of the 70% volume zone. Acts as support.
key_levels.HVN: High Volume Node — price level with concentrated volume. Acts as support/resistance (institutions defended this level).
key_levels.LVN: Low Volume Node — price level with minimal volume. Price accelerates THROUGH these zones (no one defending). LVN zones between entry and TP = price will move fast through them.

cross_validation: Volume profile VALIDATES other concepts: An OB at an HVN = confirmed institutional defense. An FVG at an LVN = high probability fill. An OB at an LVN = suspicious (no volume = no institutional activity).
